# SDFrame Developer Context

## API

- OpenAPI: https://sdframe.caldis.me/openapi.json
- Framework index: https://sdframe.caldis.me/api/frameworks.index.json
- Full framework records: https://sdframe.caldis.me/api/frameworks.json
- Categories: https://sdframe.caldis.me/api/categories.json
- Status: https://sdframe.caldis.me/status.json

## Auth

No authentication is required. SDFrame exposes read-only public static data.

## Error recovery

Validate framework slugs against /api/frameworks.index.json before fetching /api/frameworks/{slug}.json. Retry transient static-host failures with exponential backoff and cache successful responses.
